title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Threatens Iran’s Power Plants if Strait of Hormuz Does Not Open
summary_full: President Trump’s ultimatum comes after Iranian missiles struck two cities in southern Israel, including one near the country’s main nuclear research center.
summary_public: President Trump’s ultimatum comes after Iranian missiles struck two cities in southern Israel, including one near the country’s main nuclear research center.
